response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed on-screen text '紅蓮華', 'Lyrics: LiSA', and 'Music: 草野華余子' at the start of the video.
2. Identified the song as 'Gurenge' by LiSA, performed by the virtual character Ayunda Risu.
3. Performed web search using query: '"Gurenge" LiSA Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Extracted lyrics and mapped scenes: music from 00:00 to 04:05, and dialogue from 04:05 to the end of the video.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance of the song 'Gurenge' by Ayunda Risu (Hololive), followed by a dialogue scene between two characters.

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu performs the song 'Gurenge' against a background of fire. Title '紅蓮華' and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
強くなれる理由を知った
僕を連れて進め
泥だらけの走馬灯に酔う
こわばる心 震える手は掴みたいものがある
それだけさ
夜の匂いに
空睨んでも
変わっていけるのは自分自身だけ
それだけさ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I've found the reason why I'm able to become strong
Take me along as you move forward
Getting drunk on a muddy flashback
My stiffened heart and trembling hands
Have something they want to grasp
That's all it is
Even if I glare at the night sky
The only thing I can change is myself
That's all it is

scenes.description: The music ends and the two characters engage in dialogue about the fire and the monster that caused it.
